rationale: Educ. Code §49.313 concerns finality of commissioner determinations under the education funding subchapter. It does not address homestead exemptions or Tax Code §11.13(b), so no conflict arises.
quote: A decision or determination of the commissioner under this subchapter is final and not appealable.
_note: No relationship between the proposed homestead exemption increase and this rule, which governs appealability of commissioner decisions.
